frontmatter.title: 応用数学 ch1メモ（最小二乗法）

children.value: 金谷健一. (2003). これなら分かる応用数学教室: 最小二乗法からウェーブレットまで.
目的：一部の例題の行間を埋めて、論理の飛躍無く説明できるようにする

J=12∑α=1N(yα−(c0xαn+c1xαn−1+⋯+cn))2→min⁡J=\frac{1}{2} \sum_{\alpha=1}^N\left(y_\alpha-\left(c_0 x_\alpha^n+c_1 x_\alpha^{n-1}+\cdots+c_n\right)\right)^2 \rightarrow \minJ=21​α=1∑N​(yα​−(c0​xαn​+c1​xαn−1​+⋯+cn​))2→min

children.value: で偏微分すると次式を得る。

children.html: ∂J∂ck=∑α=1N(yα−c0xαn−c1xαn−1−⋯−cn)(−xαn−k)=c0∑α=1Nxα2n−k+c1∑α=1Nxα2n−k−1+⋯+cn∑α=1Nxαn−k−∑α=1Nxαn−kyα\begin{aligned} \frac{\partial J}{\partial c_k} & =\sum_{\alpha=1}^N\left(y_\alpha-c_0 x_\alpha^n-c_1 x_\alpha^{n-1}-\cdots-c_n\right)\left(-x_\alpha^{n-k}\right) \\ & =c_0 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-k}+c_1 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-k-1}+\cdots+c_n \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-k}-\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-k} y_\alpha \end{aligned}∂ck​∂J​​=α=1∑N​(yα​−c0​xαn​−c1​xαn−1​−⋯−cn​)(−xαn−k​)=c0​α=1∑N​xα2n−k​+c1​α=1∑N​xα2n−k−1​+⋯+cn​α=1∑N​xαn−k​−α=1∑N​xαn−k​yα​​
k=0,1,…,nk=0,1, \ldots, nk=0,1,…,n

children.value: に対する式を並べると次の正規方程式を得る.

\left(\begin{array}{cccc}
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n} & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-1} & \cdots & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^n \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-1} & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-2} & \cdots & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1} \\
\vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^n & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1} & \cdots & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N 1
\end{array}\right)\left(\begin{array}{c}
c_0 \\
c_1 \\
\vdots \\
c_n
\end{array}\right)=\left(\begin{array}{c}
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^n y_\alpha \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1} y_\alpha \\
\vdots \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N y_\alpha
\end{array}\right)

children.html: ∂J∂ck=∑α=1N(yα−c0xαn−c1xαn−1−⋯−cn)(−xαn−k)=c0∑α=1Nxα2n−k+c1∑α=1Nxα2n−k−1+⋯+cn∑α=1Nxαn−k−∑α=1Nxαn−kyα\begin{aligned} \frac{\partial J}{\partial c_k} &=\sum_{\alpha=1}^N\left(y_\alpha-c_0 x_\alpha^n-c_1 x_\alpha^{n-1}-\cdots-c_n\right)\left(-x_\alpha^{n-k}\right) \\ & =c_0 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-k}+c_1 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-k-1}+\cdots+c_n \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-k}-\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-k} y_\alpha \end{aligned}∂ck​∂J​​=α=1∑N​(yα​−c0​xαn​−c1​xαn−1​−⋯−cn​)(−xαn−k​)=c0​α=1∑N​xα2n−k​+c1​α=1∑N​xα2n−k−1​+⋯+cn​α=1∑N​xαn−k​−α=1∑N​xαn−k​yα​​
k=0,1,…,nk=0,1, \ldots, nk=0,1,…,n

children.value: に対する式を並べると

children.html: {c0∑α=1Nxα2n+c1∑α=1Nxα2n−1+⋯+cn∑α=1Nxαn=∑α=1Nxαnyαc0∑α=1Nxα2n−1+c1∑α=1Nxα2n−2+⋯+cn∑α=1Nxαn−k=∑α=1Nxαn−1yα⋮c0∑α=1Nxαn+c1∑α=1Nxαn−1+⋯+cn∑α=1N1=∑α=1Nyα\begin{cases} c_0 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n}+c_1 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-1}+\cdots+c_n \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n} &= \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n} y_\alpha \\ c_0 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-1}+c_1 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-2}+\cdots+c_n \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-k} &= \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1} y_\alpha \\ \quad \vdots\\ c_0 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n}+c_1 \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1}+\cdots+c_n \sum_{\alpha=1}^N 1 &= \sum_{\alpha=1}^N y_\alpha \end{cases}⎩⎨⎧​c0​∑α=1N​xα2n​+c1​∑α=1N​xα2n−1​+⋯+cn​∑α=1N​xαn​c0​∑α=1N​xα2n−1​+c1​∑α=1N​xα2n−2​+⋯+cn​∑α=1N​xαn−k​⋮c0​∑α=1N​xαn​+c1​∑α=1N​xαn−1​+⋯+cn​∑α=1N​1​=∑α=1N​xαn​yα​=∑α=1N​xαn−1​yα​=∑α=1N​yα​​

\left(\begin{array}{cccc}
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n} & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-1} & \cdots & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^n \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-1} & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{2 n-2} & \cdots & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1} \\
\vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^n & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1} & \cdots & \sum_{\alpha=1}^N 1
\end{array}\right)\left(\begin{array}{c}
c_0 \\
c_1 \\
\vdots \\
c_n
\end{array}\right)=\left(\begin{array}{c}
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^n y_\alpha \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N x_\alpha^{n-1} y_\alpha \\
\vdots \\
\sum_{\alpha=1}^N y_\alpha
\end{array}\right)

children.value: を定めればよい。式（1.75）は次のように変形できる。

children.html: J=12(a−∑k=1nckuk,a−∑l=1nclul)=12((a,a)−2(a,∑k=1nckuk)+(∑k=1nckuk,∑l=1nclul))=12(∥a∥2−2∑k=1nck(a,uk)+∑k,l=1nckcl(uk,ul))\begin{aligned} J & =\frac{1}{2}\left(\boldsymbol{a}-\sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \boldsymbol{a}-\sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l\right) \\ & =\frac{1}{2}\left((\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a})-2\left(\boldsymbol{a}, \sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k\right)+\left(\sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l\right)\right) \\ & =\frac{1}{2}\left(\|\boldsymbol{a}\|^2-2 \sum_{k=1}^n c_k\left(\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{u}_k\right)+\sum_{k, l=1}^n c_k c_l\left(\boldsymbol{u}_k, \boldsymbol{u}_l\right)\right) \end{aligned}J​=21​(a−k=1∑n​ck​uk​,a−l=1∑n​cl​ul​)=21​((a,a)−2(a,k=1∑n​ck​uk​)+(k=1∑n​ck​uk​,l=1∑n​cl​ul​))=21​⎝⎛​∥a∥2−2k=1∑n​ck​(a,uk​)+k,l=1∑n​ck​cl​(uk​,ul​)⎠⎞​​

children.html: J=12∥a−∑k=1nckuk∥2→min⁡(1.75)J=\frac{1}{2}\left\|\boldsymbol{a}-\sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k\right\|^2 \rightarrow \min \tag{1.75}J=21​∥∥​a−k=1∑n​ck​uk​∥∥​2→min(1.75)

children.value: ベクトルの和の内積は、

children.html: a,x∈Rna,x \in \mathbb{R}^na,x∈Rn

children.value:
\begin{aligned}
(a-x, a-x)
&= \sum_i^n (a_i - x_i) (a_i - x_i)\\
&= \sum_i^n (a_i^2 - 2 a_i x_i + x_i^2)\\
&= \sum_i^n a_i^2 - 2 \sum_i^n a_i x_i + \sum_i^n x_i^2\\
&= (a, a) - 2 (a, x) + (x, x)\\
&= \|a\|^2 - 2 (a, x) + \|x\|^2 \\
\end{aligned}
children.html: (a−x,a−x)=∑in(ai−xi)(ai−xi)=∑in(ai2−2aixi+xi2)=∑inai2−2∑inaixi+∑inxi2=(a,a)−2(a,x)+(x,x)=∥a∥2−2(a,x)+∥x∥2\begin{aligned} (a-x, a-x) &= \sum_i^n (a_i - x_i) (a_i - x_i)\\ &= \sum_i^n (a_i^2 - 2 a_i x_i + x_i^2)\\ &= \sum_i^n a_i^2 - 2 \sum_i^n a_i x_i + \sum_i^n x_i^2\\ &= (a, a) - 2 (a, x) + (x, x)\\ &= \|a\|^2 - 2 (a, x) + \|x\|^2 \\ \end{aligned}(a−x,a−x)​=i∑n​(ai​−xi​)(ai​−xi​)=i∑n​(ai2​−2ai​xi​+xi2​)=i∑n​ai2​−2i∑n​ai​xi​+i∑n​xi2​=(a,a)−2(a,x)+(x,x)=∥a∥2−2(a,x)+∥x∥2​

children.value: となるため、式（1.75）は次のように変形できる。

\begin{aligned}
J & =\frac{1}{2}\left(\boldsymbol{a}-\sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \boldsymbol{a}-\sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l\right) \\
& =\frac{1}{2}\left((\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{a})-2\left(\boldsymbol{a}, \sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k\right)+\left(\sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l\right)\right) \\
& =\frac{1}{2}\left(\|\boldsymbol{a}\|^2-2 \sum_{k=1}^n c_k\left(\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{u}_k\right)+\sum_{k, l=1}^n c_k c_l\left(\boldsymbol{u}_k, \boldsymbol{u}_l\right)\right)
\\
&=\frac{1}{2}\|\boldsymbol{a}\|^2
- \sum_{k=1}^n c_k\left(\boldsymbol{a}, \boldsymbol{u}_k\right)
+ \frac{1}{2} \sum_{k=1}^n \sum_{l=1}^n c_k c_l\left(\boldsymbol{u}_k, \boldsymbol{u}_l\right)
\end{aligned}

(a+b,c)=(a,c)+(b,c)(a,b,c∈Rn)(ka,b)=k(a,b)(k∈R)\begin{aligned} (a+b, c) &= (a, c) + (b, c) & (a,b,c \in \mathbb{R}^n)\\ (k a, b) &= k(a, b) & (k \in \mathbb{R}) \end{aligned}(a+b,c)(ka,b)​=(a,c)+(b,c)=k(a,b)​(a,b,c∈Rn)(k∈R)​

(a1+a2,b1+b2)=(a1,b1+b2)+(a2,b1+b2)=(a1,b1)+(a1,b2)+(a2,b1)+(a2,b2)=∑i=12(ai,b1+b2)=∑i=12∑j=12(ai,bj)\begin{aligned} (a_1 + a_2, b_1 + b_2) &= (a_1, b_1 + b_2) + (a_2, b_1 + b_2)\\ &= (a_1, b_1) + (a_1, b_2) + (a_2, b_1) + (a_2, b_2)\\ &= \sum_{i=1}^2 (a_i, b_1 + b_2)\\ &= \sum_{i=1}^2 \sum_{j=1}^2 (a_i, b_j)\\ \end{aligned}(a1​+a2​,b1​+b2​)​=(a1​,b1​+b2​)+(a2​,b1​+b2​)=(a1​,b1​)+(a1​,b2​)+(a2​,b1​)+(a2​,b2​)=i=1∑2​(ai​,b1​+b2​)=i=1∑2​j=1∑2​(ai​,bj​)​

children.value:
\begin{aligned}
\left(\sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l \right)
&= 
\sum_{k=1}^n \left(c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l \right)
\\
&=
\sum_{k=1}^n \sum_{l=1}^n  (c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l)
\\
&=
\sum_{k=1}^n \sum_{l=1}^n  c_k c_l (\boldsymbol{u}_k, \boldsymbol{u}_l)
\end{aligned}
children.html: (∑k=1nckuk,∑l=1nclul)=∑k=1n(ckuk,∑l=1nclul)=∑k=1n∑l=1n(ckuk,clul)=∑k=1n∑l=1nckcl(uk,ul)\begin{aligned} \left(\sum_{k=1}^n c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l \right) &= \sum_{k=1}^n \left(c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, \sum_{l=1}^n c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l \right) \\ &= \sum_{k=1}^n \sum_{l=1}^n (c_k \boldsymbol{u}_k, c_l \boldsymbol{u}_l) \\ &= \sum_{k=1}^n \sum_{l=1}^n c_k c_l (\boldsymbol{u}_k, \boldsymbol{u}_l) \end{aligned}(k=1∑n​ck​uk​,l=1∑n​cl​ul​)​=k=1∑n​(ck​uk​,l=1∑n​cl​ul​)=k=1∑n​l=1∑n​(ck​uk​,cl​ul​)=k=1∑n​l=1∑n​ck​cl​(uk​,ul​)​
∑k,l=1n:=∑k=1n∑l=1n\sum_{k, l=1}^n := \sum_{k=1}^n \sum_{l=1}^nk,l=1∑n​:=k=1∑n​l=1∑n​
